steps.t: Herion's encampment is located somewhere south of Erchar's encampment, along the River Ernilos. You should search out Herion's camp.
Herion can be found in his encampment. You should speak with Herion.
Aras can be found in Herion's encampment. You should speak with Aras about what he has seen.
Herion can be found at his encampment. You should speak with Herion about how you may be of assistance.
